name: Vanguarr
overview: Surfaces per-user Suggested for You channels from Vanguarr inside Jellyfin.
description: Connects Jellyfin to Vanguarr's Suggested for You API, resolves ranked suggestions to existing library items, and exposes them as a per-user channel without extra libraries or symlink trees.

versions.changelog:
- Fixes the blank Suggested for You row caused by Jellyfin requesting latest channel items without a populated user id.
- Invalidates cached empty results when the Vanguarr base URL, suggestions key, or channel label changes.
- Adds plugin-side logging for fetched and resolved suggestion counts to speed up troubleshooting.
